market_regime: Selective risk-on: AI/tech leading (+21% XLK 20d), defense/energy with geopolitical premium, financials lagging; VIX 16.40 rising — cautious optimism

scanner_blind_spots.reason: Supply-constrained 90% revenue growth requires optical networking sector-specific monitoring. PEG=0.6 on capacity-limited (not demand-limited) business is the correct framework — scanner sees high trailing P/E and skips. Best AI infrastructure play the scanner missed.

The 44% selloff is caused by THREE specific transient headwinds (Deltek/DOGE, Neptune, Procare) across different verticals — requires multi-segment earnings transcript reading to distinguish transient from structural. Scanner sees declining momentum; misses $2.17B FCF at decade-low 13.9x fwd P/E.

da Vinci 5 cardiac FDA clearance (Jan 2026) opens 160,000-procedure/year TAM — requires monitoring specific FDA device capability approvals, not safety recalls. Scanner tracks FDA safety issues but not capability expansions that increase TAM.

Canadian TSX-listed company with no ApeWisdom Reddit presence. Nuclear renaissance thesis requires synthesizing: Kazakhstan production cuts + Russia sanctions forcing Western utility contracting + AI data center power demand. No single scanner template captures this multi-domain intersection.

Near 52W high (not 'down enough' for dip screens). CEO buying $25M with no salary requires Form 4 monitoring with compensation-aware cluster detection the scanner lacks. Profitable specialty pharma at P/E=7.3 doesn't trigger FDA binary event scanners.

Large-cap defense ($56B) doesn't surface via ApeWisdom. 15% organic growth story requires reading past confusing 190% headline (acquisition-related) in earnings transcripts. $25B unbooked MAC contracts in negotiation are invisible until formally booked.

At $479/share and $2.3T market cap, Broadcom doesn't fit scanner's undiscovered template. The $70B AI backlog with multi-year hyperscaler co-development agreements requires reading hyperscaler capex allocation reports across Google, AWS, and Microsoft simultaneously.

value_picks.analyst_take: 60% drawdown on leadership transition + conservative guidance; 47 analysts maintain Buy at $193.79 avg (+44%); NDR 115% proves product stickiness; AI security spend is secular
